title: GeminiCraft
description: Your AI assistant from Google. Integrated into your favourite cave game.
body:
![LogoHeader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c64466709c158cbbc1cc14a0c584c3bf90a17fc_0.webp)
## THIS IS A CONCEPT PLUG-IN
This is an experimental plugin created just for fun! It’s designed to be entertaining and potentially helpful for Minecraft players. While it’s not an official Meraki Studios project, we made it as a playful experiment for the Minecraft community to enjoy and explore.

## Commands
Use `/gemini` or `/g` to communicate with the AI and have it perform tasks for the Minecraft server!


## Warning ⚠️
**This is a resource-intensive plugin; therefore, only use it on a high-resource server!**

## Requirements
- Minecraft 1.8.X -> Latest version
- Java 8 Minimum required

```
Using this plugin with Gemini may result in additional charges to your account.
These fees will vary according to how much you interact with the plugin.
Meraki Studios is not liable for any charges incurred as a result of the use of this plugin.
```
**Google is a trademark of Google LLC. This project is not associated with or endorsed by Google in any way.**
